# Quint

Quint provides scientific technology for diagnostics, research and quality control.

## Key pages
- /it/ and /en/: overview and contact access
- /it/products/ and /en/products/: solutions catalogue
- /it/contact/ and /en/contact/: business contact form

Content is available in Italian and English. Product pages describe rapid diagnostics, molecular diagnostics, clinical analyzers, cell analysis, sample preparation, research imaging, process monitoring and quality control.
